Bash(python3 -c "import json; data = json.load\(open\(''/Users/vfilev/serdica/LanguageTrainer/data/history/lesson_5_stambolov.json''\)\); print\(f''Valid JSON. {len\(data[""questions""]\)} questions found.''\); keys = set\(\); [keys.add\(q[''correct_choice'']\) for q in data[''questions'']]; print\(f''Correct choices distribution: {dict\(\(k, sum\(1 for q in data[""questions""] if q[""correct_choice""]==k\)\) for k in sorted\(keys\)\)}''\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; data = json.load\(open\(''/Users/vfilev/serdica/LanguageTrainer/data/history/lesson_4_bulgarian_crisis.json''\)\); print\(f''Valid JSON. {len\(data[""questions""]\)} questions found.''\); keys = [q[''correct_choice''] for q in data[''questions'']]; print\(f''Correct answer distribution: '' + '', ''.join\(f""{k}={keys.count\(k\)}"" for k in [''А'',''Б'',''В'',''Г'']\)\)")
